title: footwork
description: Library mod containing framework for use in my other mods
body:
This is required by Project: War Dance, Taoism, Cloak and Dagger, and Combat Circle. It adds some methods and states used between all of them.

The mod provides the ICombatCapability for ItemStacks, which allows custom posture values interpreted on a per-stack basis without having to necessarily install Project: War Dance.

It also adds a dummied out stealth base. This is used for Stealth Mission to override with more robust stealth mechanics, while permitting PWD to use awareness status without Stealth Mission installed.

By itself, this mod adds two effects, fortification and corrosion, which increase and decrease armor by 2 respectively. There's also sleep, paralysis, and petrify, which freezes an entity in place. A host of other attributes and effects are also provided, but they are not very useful without my other mods.

Icon is taken from game-icons.net.
